name: Springtime Punch
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Frozen Pineapple Juice Concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine sugar and water. Bring to a boil.
2. Continue boiling for 10 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice, orange juice, and thawed pineapple juice concentrate.
4. Stir in the ginger ale until well combined.
